public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as grain measurer.
manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a grain measurer still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of grain measurer in and around Starbreak Commune, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Starbreak Commune workable through the obligations of grain measurer while managing the immediate pressure of crew attrition in Sheresh Communes.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Starbreak Commune, that usually means carrying crew attrition, signal blackout, observation exposure without letting the role of grain measurer visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Kelm Snowveil can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Kelm Snowveil needs help with a problem in Starbreak Commune that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Kelm Snowveil carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia. In Starbreak Commune, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Route Warden Compacts, Containment Research Concord.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Starbreak Commune: the part of Starbreak Commune where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
